name: Cottonwood Lookout Tent
description: A soft-launch canvas stay planned for guests who want a more exposed desert feel once the water and shade systems are fully dialed in.
shortDescription: Canvas stay coming after the first pilot unit proves reliable.

photos.alt: Desert canvas tent site at dusk with mountains in the distance.

policies.checkIn: Planned for 4:00 PM self check-in after activation.
policies.cancellation: Policy will publish when the unit is activated.
policies.smoking: No smoking near canvas or brush.
policies.access: Final access conditions still being evaluated.
policies.weather: This unit will only open once heat, wind, and storm SOPs are finalized.
